mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (id, author_id, category_id, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{likes, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{favorites, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{comments, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, category_id AS categoryId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, views, is_top AS isTop, is_essence AS isEssence, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, category_id AS categoryId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, views, is_top AS isTop, is_essence AS isEssence, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY IFNULL(is_top, 0) DESC, IFNULL(is_essence, 0) DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, category_id AS categoryId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, views, is_top AS isTop, is_essence AS isEssence, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE status = 0 AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY IFNULL(is_top, 0) DESC, IFNULL(is_essence, 0) DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET likes = IFNULL(likes,0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET favorites = IFNULL(favorites,0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_top = CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_top, 0) = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_essence = CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_essence, 0) = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comments = GREATEST(0, IFNULL(comments, 0) - #{delta}), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE status = 0 AND category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 0

SELECT id, author_id AS authorId, category_id AS categoryId, title, content, tags, likes, favorites, comments, views, is_top AS isTop, is_essence AS isEssence, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.author_id AS authorId, p.category_id AS categoryId, p.title, p.content, p.tags, p.likes, p.favorites, p.comments, p.views, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_essence AS isEssence, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM post p INNER JOIN `like` l ON l.target_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.target_type = #{targetType} AND l.action = 'LIKE' WHERE p.status = 0 ORDER BY l.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
